_comment: Source of truth for jakejoyner.com/portfolio. Owned by Jake. Edit + run build.sh to regenerate index.html.

site.title: Jake Joyner — Projects
site.subtitle: Things I've built. Source of truth for what I'm shipping.
site.footer_text: Built in La Jolla. Source on desktop:~/homepage/portfolio.

projects.title: AILedger
projects.tagline: Open-source AI inference logging infrastructure for EU AI Act Article 12 compliance.
projects.description: A drop-in Cloudflare Workers proxy that sits between an AI app and its provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini). Every inference becomes an immutable, hash-chained audit record. Raw prompts and outputs are never stored — only SHA-256 fingerprints — so it's GDPR-clean by design. Compliance report exports to PDF in one click.

projects.title: skillrt
projects.tagline: A runtime and spec for executable markdown skills consumed by AI agents.
projects.description: One spec for executable markdown skills, one reference runtime in Rust, two content modes (prose-only Soapstones-compatible + typed structured with frontmatter), and an eventual hosted registry where any agent can pull a skill written by any other agent. v0.1 ships parser, validator, local install/list/info; v0.2 lands the hosted registry.
